reviews.review_description: The movement feels really good. The parkour is great. That level design is good. The only problem it’s very kiddish and very colorful so no shadows doesn’t look realistic, but other than that the movement is good all the level designs are awesome and the mechanics really good game need to fix a few bugs made it make it more realistic and a few other things but overall I have highly ￼￼recommend

Very fun, a bit like Fall Guys in VR. The controls are very smooth, you can double jump and glide. I hope to add more levels and match competitions. I can't believe how much fun it will be to play with 30 people.
Wow! This super fun VR game lets you jump like a bunny and bounce like a spring in a magical wonderland! 🐇🌈Whoosh—it’s like flying with your feet!
